purpose: Template for component-specific review prompts. Copy this to your component directory as review-prompt.json and customize.
domain_description: What kind of artifact is being reviewed
focus_areas: List the specific areas reviewers should focus on for this component
These should align with the rulebook rules
Example: authority model clarity, scope boundary consistency, artifact lifecycle

severity_definitions.blocking: Prevents the artifact from being used safely. Must be fixed before freeze.
severity_definitions.major: Significant gap that will cause problems downstream. Must be fixed before freeze.
severity_definitions.minor: Small inconsistency or improvement. Can be frozen with conditions.
severity_definitions.suggestion: Nice-to-have improvement. Does not affect freeze decision.

full_sweep_rounds: first and last (when no pushbacks found)
notes: Customize focus_areas based on your component's rulebook
Keep severity_definitions consistent across all components
